title: agrostis canina var. elatior
intro: Agrostis canina var. elatior, also known as dog's grass or tall red fescue, is a subspecies of grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis canina var. elatior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Agrostis canina var. elatior can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although specific preparation methods may vary depending on the intended use and cultural tradition.
